mapper.select: select i.product_id, i.product_name, i.specification, i.supplier, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) as total_quantity, coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as total_amount, count(distinct i.order_id) as order_count from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id where o.customer_id = #{customerId} group by i.product_id, i.product_name, i.specification, i.supplier order by total_quantity desc, total_amount desc limit #{limit}
